howItWorks.intro: This defi yield farming calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Effective APY
rules.formula: Effective APY = (Net Profit / Deposit) x (12 / Months) x 100
rules.explanation: Annualized return after subtracting gas fees from total earnings.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: Is yield farming profitable after gas fees?
faq.a: It depends on deposit size and gas costs. Small deposits under $1,000 often lose money to fees, especially on Ethereum mainnet.

faq.q: What risks does yield farming have?
faq.a: Key risks include impermanent loss, smart contract bugs, rug pulls, and token price crashes. Never invest more than you can afford to lose.

howWeCalculate.intro: This defi yield farming calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
